name: rig-dashboard
description: Gaming rig stats dashboard for secondary display

scripts.build: npm run prepare:lhm && set PATH=%USERPROFILE%\.cargo\bin;%PATH% && tauri build
scripts.verify: npm run prepare:lhm && set PATH=%USERPROFILE%\.cargo\bin;%PATH% && cargo test --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && cargo check --manifest-path src-tauri/Cargo.toml && vitest run

author: Daniel
